name: weather
description: Get a weather forecast formatted as a clean, readable daily breakdown. Use when the user asks about the weather, forecast, temperature, whether to bring an umbrella, what to wear, or anything related to current or upcoming weather conditions for a location. Also triggers for questions like 'will it rain tomorrow' or 'is it going to be cold this week'.
author: pantheon
triggers: is it going to be cold

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: City, zip code, or location. Uses the user's default location if not specified.

schedulable.description: Send a daily weather forecast via Telegram
